note: Mathlib/Data/Nat/Prime/Defs.lean:340 `def decidablePrime' (p : ℕ) : Decidable (Prime p) := decidable_of_iff' _ prime_def_minFac` — a genuine trial-division primality-testing algorithm (checks no factor ≤ minFac up to the square root), a concrete instance of the general 'primality test' concept rather than a formalization of the concept itself (Mathlib also has the specific Lucas–Lehmer test in NumberTheory/LucasLehmer.lean, already `@[wikidata Q1138992]`-tagged to a different, more specific QID).
